titleStmt.title: SII 15.184: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 184. (B.K. No. 15 of 1929-30.) GUṆḌKARJIGI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a nandi pillar lying in the Hanumān temple.
This inscription commences with the well known vachana of Siddharāma and recounts the praśasti of the king. This is followed by the description of Rāma-daṇḍādhipa. The rest of the epigraph is lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yaparamēsvara
Īsvaranu
Aḍaṁgikoṁ
[¨r]baṁṇigeyāgi
gigaḷa manada kone
ya jōtīsvaranu vrisabha
na rūpāgi yajamā
na Ācā¨ryyanuṁ tāneyā
gi yōgādisaṁpaṁna kaḷi
yaṁgaḷellavaṁ saṁpādisi yō
garamaṇiya kṣētravane sta
ḷaviṭṭu salākeviḍidu Abhi
navaśrīsaiḷamana māḍi ka
pilasiddha malikā¨rjunadēva
re baṁdu nelasi niṁdu pu
ṇyapāpaṁgaḷige baraṁ pēḷī
besaṁ pēḷalu yē bese
dēvā yeṁdenalu Ī stāna
dali mānyavāgi vūrugaḷa
bhūmigaḷaṁ dhanaṁgaḷaṁ Ī
liṁgake hastōdakaṁ māḍi
koṭuda manaṁ pēsada kaḷe
du koṁḍeheneṁbātana Āta
na mātāṁ mātāpitrugaḷe
lamaṁ yapattayōḷu kōṭi
varisaṁbare puḷugoṁḍada
narakadoḷagikki nīnāhuti
goḷtiru gaṁḍā Ele pāpā(pa)vē

svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabdāḷaṁ
krita srīmadvijayakaṭakanivāsa ma
hārājādhirāja paramēsvara para
mabhaṭṭārakaṁ dvārāvatīpuravarādhī
svaraṁ viṣṇuvaṁśōdbhavaṁ yādava
kuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāsabhāska
raṁ Arirāyajagajhaṁpa nijabhuja
maṁdaramathitamāḷavamahā¨rṇnavōccaḷi
talakṣmī svayaṁbara gū¨rjaravāra
ṇāṁkusaṁ teluṁgarāyasiraḥkama
ḷanāḷamūḷōtpāṭanakaraṁ ka¨rṇāṭarā
yavaṁśābhirāmaṁ neladu¨rgga giri
du¨rgga jaladu¨rgga vanadu¨rgga vidrāvaṇa
rāyavijaya rāyanārāyaṇa
śrīmatu prauḍha pratāpacakrava¨rtti śrī
siṁghaṇadēvavijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivriddhiprava¨rdhamānamācaṁ
drā¨rkkatāraṁbara saluttaviralu ©
śrīgaurīkucakuṁkumāṁkitavikṣā(śā)ḷō
rasthaḷōdbhāsakaṁ nāgēṁdrāmara si
ddha pūjita padābjaṁ trijagadra
kṣakaṁ rāgaṁ bettire rāmanāthano
laviṁ śrīrāmadaṁḍādhipa
lakṣmiyaniḷā caṁdrā¨rka
tāraṁbaraṁ . tanagāḷdaṁ kali siṁghaṇaṁ
tanage deyvaṁ rāma
sōmasacivaṁ tanage tāya nāgavve
taṁnōpaḷūḷipina nāgāṁgane taṁna pu
tranesavī śrīsōmanāthā¨rjunaṁ vinutaṁ
ya rāya rāmanasadaṁ rāyapra
dhānōttemaṁ © svasti samastaprasastisahi
taṁ śrī manmahāpasāpāyati(pasāyita) visamahayā
rēvaṁta parabaḷakritāṁ
